recommendations.title: Rescue Under Fire
recommendations.overview: The crew of a medical helicopter suffers an accident when helping a joint force of USA and United Nations troops under Spanish command division in Afghanistan. The Spanish army has only one night to organize the rescue of the crew and injured, but wh

recommendations.title: No One Will Save You
recommendations.overview: A lonely woman battles extraterrestrials who threaten her future while forcing her to face her past.

recommendations.title: Spacehunter: Adventures in the Forbidden Zone
recommendations.overview: On a distant planet inhabited by mutants, two bounty hunters race to rescue three Earth female captives from the clutches of an evil warlord.

recommendations.title: Give 'em Hell, Malone
recommendations.overview: A tough as nails private investigator (Malone) squares off with gangsters and their thugs to protect a valuable secret. Malone goes through hell to protect the information but he dishes some hell as well...

recommendations.title: X-Men: Apocalypse
recommendations.overview: After the re-emergence of the world's first mutant, world-destroyer Apocalypse, the X-Men must unite to defeat his extinction level plan.

recommendations.title: Only Old Men Are Going to Battle

recommendations.director: Martino Ferro, Fabrizio Biggio, Francesco Mandelli

recommendations.title: Solitary
recommendations.overview: A man wakes up inside a room to discover he's a prisoner sent into space to form Earth's first colony, and worse - his cell mate Alana is hell bent on destroying everything.

recommendations.title: The General
